hero.title: Hitek Work is a <1>real data</1> collection system for effective remote team management
hero.subtitle_line1: Hitek Work is not a surveillance tool,
hero.subtitle_line2: It's a tool that helps teams gain insight to deliver peak productivity solutions.

timeline.label: Real-time Activity
timeline.title: Activity timeline in <1>real time</1>
timeline.subtitle: The timeline displays activity milestones by minute/hour to reflect focus levels and interruptions. Helping managers see "what's really happening".
timeline.highlight1_title: Clear activity milestones on the timeline
timeline.highlight1_desc: Each time block is displayed precisely by minute/hour, no guesswork.
timeline.highlight2_desc: Working time and interruption time are clearly separated.
timeline.highlight3_title: Drill down by User / Task / time range
timeline.highlight3_desc: Filter by individual employee, specific task, or time period.
timeline.image_alt: Realtime Timeline illustration showing work blocks and interruptions
timeline.image_caption: Illustration: Timeline by minute/hour, separating work vs interruptions

screenshot.label: Smart Screenshot
screenshot.title: <1>Smart</1> Screenshot
screenshot.subtitle: Captures screen contextually to reflect actual working behavior. Easy to search by Project / Task / User / time.
screenshot.highlight1_desc: Quick navigation with prev/next, full context view from the timeline.
screenshot.highlight2_desc: Timestamp, project, task, activity level — all available.
screenshot.highlight3_desc: Filter by User, Project, Task, or a specific time range.
screenshot.image1_alt: Smart Screenshot modal viewer showing detailed metadata
screenshot.image1_caption: View screenshot details with full metadata
screenshot.image2_alt: Screenshot gallery view showing timeline grid

ai_classification.label: AI Activity Classification
ai_classification.title: AI identifies <1>real work</1> / classifies activities
ai_classification.subtitle: AI understands screenshot context and automatically labels activities to generate reliable management data.
ai_classification.point1_desc: Identifies the application in use (e.g., Google Chrome, Zalo, Figma)
ai_classification.point2_desc: Classifies activity groups (e.g., Web Browser, Communication, Design Tool)
ai_classification.point5_desc: Brief content description so managers understand "what's being done" without opening each screenshot
ai_classification.image_alt: AI Activity Classification modal showing application name, category, working status, confidence, and details
ai_classification.image_caption: AI analyzes and labels Working + Confidence + Details from Screenshot

awareness_reminder.label: Awareness Reminder
awareness_reminder.title: Remind employees — help them self-correct, <1>not surveillance</1>
awareness_reminder.subtitle: When the system detects prolonged low activity, an email is sent so employees can review their situation and respond if there is a valid reason (meetings, research, tasks outside the system…).
awareness_reminder.email_intro: During monitoring of your work shift on <1>[dd/mm/yyyy]</1>, the Hitek Work system detected periods where you had no activity for longer than usual.
awareness_reminder.email_response_para: If there is any work-related reason (meetings, research, tasks outside the system, etc.), you can respond so the system can adjust the assessment more accurately.
awareness_reminder.email_purpose_para: The purpose of this notification is to help you understand your personal work situation, not to make a negative assessment.
awareness_reminder.email_footer: This email was sent automatically by the Hitek Work system
awareness_reminder.email_caption: Illustration: reminder email using a template, with overview statistics and a supportive message.
awareness_reminder.content_item1: <1>Shift overview:</1> date/time slot, total time, number of idle/freeze instances
awareness_reminder.content_item3: <1>Call to respond</1> so the system can assess more accurately
awareness_reminder.rule_item1: Send email when activity falls below configured threshold
awareness_reminder.tone_text: increase transparency & support improvement — not intended as a negative assessment.
